productDisplayName: Vans unisex Authentic Olive Casual Shoes
description: Want to channel the spirit of the 1960s? The decade that birthed skateboard culture was also the decade that brought us the first vans shoe &ndash and you can proudly step out in the very same Authentic unisex shoe which first hit the shelves in 1966. This shoe is supremely classic, looks great on guys and girls, comfortable and practical. And the highlight is the funky yellow and brown laces. (Normal white laces are also included). Uppers Canvas uppers for durability and comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand tab on the forefoot seam and brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
